title: Botanic Pots
description: Lets you place flowers in Decorated Pots
body:
This datapack lets you place any flower in the Decorated Pots added in 1.20 to give pots more color and functionality!

 
## Features:
- Place any flower (including double tall flowers) inside the decorated pot.
- Some flowers have a unique look.
- It does NOT require a resource pack making installation easier.
 
## How to use:
First, you must place an item frame on the top of the Decorated Pot. Then place a regular flower pot inside the item frame. If done correctly the item frame should disappear. While holding a flower you can now Right Click on the top of the Decorated Pot to place the flower in it. To remove the flower Right Click on the top of the Decorated pot with an empty hand.

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
